_doc: Triaged npm-audit advisories. scripts/audit-gate.mjs fails the build for any high/critical advisory NOT listed here (each needs a reason + expiry), and for any listed entry past its expiry, so triage decisions cannot rot silently. As of 2026-07-23 this list is empty: the frontend now runs as a Node SSR deployment (next.config.mjs output:'standalone'), so the Next.js server-runtime advisories DO apply here - and they are genuinely FIXED by pinning next to 16.3.0-canary.94 (the first release carrying the patches; production audit reports zero high/critical). postcss is resolved at source via the overrides pin in package.json. Re-pin next to 16.3.0 stable when it ships.
